title: CURVER Style Rattan Effect Kitchen, Living room, Bathroom, Bedroom, Utility Large Rectangular Storage Basket 30 Litres - Grey
features: An elegant storage solution for your bathroom, kitchen, living room, office or study areas
Traditional flat rattan effect design with comfortable handles
Durable, lightweight and easy to clean
External Dimensions: 44 x 33 x 23 cm (L x W x H)
description: From the manufacturer Curver Style Large Rectangular Storage Basket Grey 30 Litre The Style large rectangular 30 litre basket is multi functional and can be used for neatly storing all larger products around your home. In your bedroom, bathroom or your office you can be sure that wherever you have items to store, this versatile basket is the ideal storage solution. It comes with easy to grab handles and being made from durable resin this basket is easy to clean and will stay looking good for years. Main Features Elegant Rattan Effect Style Comfortable Handles Multi-functional Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Bedroom In your bedroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for wardrobe storage for all of your clothes, bags and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Living Room In your living area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your magazines, blankets and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Office or Study In your office or study area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your all of your pens, notepads and books keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
